context: Evaluates the agent's ability to create a .context/finding file from research output, with summary, detail, and recommended action sections.

checklist.name: Correct type
checklist.description: File created under .context/findings/ with type: FINDING in frontmatter

checklist.name: Valid frontmatter

checklist.name: Recommended action
checklist.description: Recommended Action section with concrete next steps
